'''lakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swooningly|swooningly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swooningly|swooningly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lakate|lakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lakatesher|lakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lakatesherĂ«m|lakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lakatero|lakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lakateshĂ«|lakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lakateshĂ«m|lakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilakatero|gokilakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilakateshĂ«|gokilakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilakateshĂ«m|gokilakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golakankerom|golakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golakankeshĂ«|golakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golakankeshĂ«m|golakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golakankeya|golakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lakaterom|lakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lakatemu|lakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lakateya|lakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilakaterom|gokilakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilakatemu|gokilakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilakateya|gokilakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lakakate|lakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lakakatesher|lakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lakakatesherĂ«m|lakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lakakatero|lakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lakakateshĂ«|lakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lakakateshĂ«m|lakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilakakatero|gokilakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilakakateshĂ«|gokilakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilakakateshĂ«m|gokilakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golakakankerom|golakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golakakankeshĂ«|golakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golakakankeshĂ«m|golakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golakakankeya|golakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lakakaterom|lakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lakakatemu|lakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lakakateya|lakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilakakaterom|gokilakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilakakatemu|gokilakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilakakateya|gokilakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠte|lĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠtesher|lĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠtero|lĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠkĂŠtero|gokilĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠkĂŠnkerom|golĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠkĂŠnkeya|golĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠterom|lĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠtemu|lĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠkĂŠteya|lĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠkĂŠterom|gokilĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠkĂŠteya|gokilĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafkafte|lafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafkaftesher|lafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafkaftesherĂ«m|lafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafkaftero|lafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafkafteshĂ«|lafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafkafteshĂ«m|lafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafkaftero|gokilafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafkafteshĂ«|gokilafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafkafteshĂ«m|gokilafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafkafnkerom|golafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafkafnkeshĂ«|golafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafkafnkeshĂ«m|golafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafkafnkeya|golafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafkafterom|lafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafkaftemu|lafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafkafteya|lafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafkafterom|gokilafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafkaftemu|gokilafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafkafteya|gokilafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
